creator: buganini@gmail.com
text:
Are you sure the binary could work correctly?
It may be able to be built and executed, but I'm not sure if it can
manipulate hive correctly.

Regards,
Buganini

2012/1/11 Kurt Jaeger <pi@opsec.eu>:
> Hi!
>
>> Approved, thanks!
>
> Here's a more detailed patch, which allows it to build on amd64 as well,
> and it adds bin/reged to the installed files.
>
> Would that be OK as well ?
>
> --
